untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 'System popularity indicator' (>40% of trend followers active in same direction) and 'first pullback within trend' detection, neither of which exist in the allowed indicator set. These would require external data feeds or custom composite indicators not available in standard OHLCV/technical analysis toolset.
translation_notes: Translated the spirit of the rule using available indicators: (1) Close above 200-day MA to confirm uptrend persistence, (2) ADX > 25 to confirm strong trend following consensus among price action rather than external system tracking, (3) Exit when price closes below 200-day MA. The original 'avoid contrarian positions' and 'first pullback entry' conditions cannot be precisely replicated without access to meta-signal aggregation data. The 2% stop loss and profit target at 200-day MA are preserved.
